link.description: A labeled URI associated with an app.

image.description: An image associated with an app, including accessibility and display metadata. Exactly one of `image` (ATProto blob) or `uri` (remote URL) MUST be present. Consumers SHOULD ignore image items that have neither or both.

purpose.description: How directories and stores should use the image.

alt.description: Alt text description of the image, for accessibility.

aspectRatio.description: width:height represents an aspect ratio. It may be approximate.

purposeIcon.description: A small square icon representing the app, typically used in launchers, lists, and tab bars.

purposeLogo.description: A logotype or wordmark for the app.

purposeHero.description: A large promotional or feature image, typically used at the top of a directory listing.

purposeScreenshot.description: A screenshot of the app's UI, used in directory and store listings.

purposeBanner.description: A wide banner image, such as a header image for a profile or listing page.

purposeSocialCard.description: An image sized and formatted for social media sharing previews (Open Graph, Twitter Card, etc.).

purposeAppStore.description: A promotional image formatted for a native app store listing.

purposeOther.description: An image whose purpose does not fit any other known value.

status.description: Current release or maintenance status of an app.

unreleased.description: The app has been announced but is not yet available.

preview.description: The app is available as an alpha, beta, early access, or preview release.

unmaintained.description: The app may still be available, but is no longer actively maintained.

discontinued.description: The app is no longer available or supported.
